# Benzene

---
execute:
  echo: false
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}

# set parameter
characteristic <- "Benzene"

res <- knitr::knit_child("templates/_parameter_chunk.Rmd", envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = "\n")

```
